method: Phi^15 Resonance vs Hash Leading-Zero-Bit Correlation

interpretation.pearson: WEAK or no correlation (r=-0.0023, p=0.9818): Phi^15 resonance does not significantly predict hash leading zeros.
interpretation.group_difference: NO DIFFERENCE: High-Φ and low-Φ nonces produce similar hash leading zero counts (diff=-0.12 bits, p=0.7307).
interpretation.above_median: NO PREDICTIVE POWER: Φ-resonant nonces have a 44.7% probability of producing an above-median hash (near 50% chance).
interpretation.verdict: NO EVIDENCE: No significant correlation between Phi^15 resonance and hash leading zeros found in this sample. The Phi^15 nonce pattern exists but does not predict hash quality.
